data.Modification: Iodoacetamide derivative/Addition of Glycine/Addition of G

project.title: Tandem affinity purification for sigma3 interacting host proteins
project.projectDescription: In order study the mechanism of how sigma3 regulates NF-kB activation, we performed tandem affinity purification to identify its host interacting proteins.
project.sampleProcessingProtocol: To identify the σ3 host interactome, InterPlay Mammalian TAP system (Agilent Technologies, Cat No. 240103) was used following their manuals. Protein complexes were boiled in 1x SDS loading buffer and then subjected for analysis by LC-MS/MS.
project.dataProcessingProtocol: Database search was against NCBI database for Homo sapiens RefSeq having 81270 sequences with incorporated Sigma3 and SigmaNS proteins in the database. Oxidation of M, deamidation of N and Q, were specified as dynamic modifications of amino acid residues; carbamidomethyl C was specified as a static modification.

references.referenceLine: Pang X, Liu S, Zhu Y, Hinchman MM, Qiao N, Li X, Dai W, Tong Y, Xing M, Ren J, Parker JSL, Guo Y, Zhou D. A dsRNA Viral Transcriptional Regulator Evades Innate Immunity by Hijacking Host CoTranscription Factor DHX9. Adv Sci (Weinh). 2026 13(10):e12262
